name: obsidian-wiki
description: Marketplace hosting two complementary plugins for an Obsidian vault: obsidian-wiki (producer; runs in the vault) and vault-context (consumer; runs in project repos).

plugins.name: obsidian-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy-style LLM wiki workflow for an Obsidian vault: ingest sources, query with citations, lint for health issues, scan AI coding sessions, regenerate the vault index, and maintain a CLAUDE.md schema.

plugins.name: vault-context
plugins.description: Surface Obsidian-vault knowledge inside project repos: scan the current project, match against the vault's index, and write a CLAUDE.md-loaded sidecar with relevant page references.
